Module_Player_Tracker.description: Provides realtime location data on team members.
Module_Player_Tracker.flavorText: Equip in a module slot to view your team members on the map.

PotBellyStove.description: A wrought iron stove for cooking basic meals.
PotBellyStove.flavorText: Hearty and filling, the warm meals provided by this stove are the next steps towards culinary perfection.

Platinum_Ore.description: As rare on Icarus as on Earth.
Platinum_Ore.flavorText: One of the least reactive metals in the universe, platinum requires extremely high temperatures for smelting and refinement.

Platinum_Ingot.description: An inert and corrosion-resistant metal, perfect for electronics.
Platinum_Ingot.flavorText: Enough platinum to found a small kingdom, were you on Earth.

Rug_PolarBear.flavorText: Instantly transforms your shelter or cabin into an 18th century hunting lodge.

PolarBear_Trophy.flavorText: Greater challenges await beyond the terrazone, but here, there is no greater emblem of your eminence.

PolarBear_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Polar Bear.
PolarBear_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Poison_Arrow.flavorText: Requiring less accuracy, but more patience, the poison arrow brings down quarry slowly, but surely.

Poison_Paste.description: A slow-working toxin made from spoiled meat.
Poison_Paste.flavorText: \'Life is a slow working poison\' - Jean Hurvit

Portable_Beacon.description: Displays a map marker when deployed. Prospectors can adjust the map markers icon and colour by interacting with it.
Portable_Beacon.flavorText: Absorbs the smallest amount of light from any atmosphere and stores it in a small internal battery that can last for hundreds of years with minimal charge. The beacon offers a BYO solution.

Platinum_Bolt.flavorText: Though eclipsed by exotics, platinum remains extremely valuable, even if the market is somewhat distant.

Platinum_Spear.description: Priceless on Earth. An advanced survival tool on Icarus.
Platinum_Spear.flavorText: A midweight, short-shafted ahlspeiss spear that, composition aside, would not have looked out of place in 16th century Prussia.

Platinum_Knife.description: A precision blade, stronger than steel.
Platinum_Knife.flavorText: Platinum\'s durablity gives an incredibly accurate, lethal cutting edge.

Platinum_Axe.description: An axceedingly reliable, accurate hewing tool.
Platinum_Axe.flavorText: "Give me six hours to chop down a tree, I\'ll spend the first four sharpening the axe" - A. Lincoln

Platinum_Sickle.description: An extremely precise, high yield harvesting tool.
Platinum_Sickle.flavorText: A proletariat icon made from a near-priceless material, yet no more valuable than lead when compared to exotics themselves.

Platinum_Hammer.description: Light, durable, accurate, but still a hammer.
Platinum_Hammer.flavorText: "On Icarus, you\'re either the hammer, or the anvil" - Javier Survez

Platinum_Pickaxe.flavorText: There is a small, but specific class of problems for which the only solution is a pickaxe.

Meta_Module_PlayerTracker.description: Provides realtime location data on team members.
Meta_Module_PlayerTracker.flavorText: Equip in a module slot to view your team members on the map.

Pumpkin.flavorText: Ensuring that Halloween becomes a multi-planet holiday. Best cooked.

Pastry.description: A simple but satisfying shortcrust pastry.
Pastry.flavorText: \'Icarus was only truly colonized when we began making pastry on that planet\' - Jacques Merrida

Pumpkin_Bread.description: A noticeably yellow loaf that significantly increases endurance.

Pickled_Carrot.flavorText: Like many other ancient ways, pickling has found a place on Icarus.

Poisoned_Bait.flavorText: Keep away from pets and children.

Meta_Pumpkin_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Pumpkin Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Poison_Sack.description: A slightly squishy organ harvested from native creatures

Prototype_Boss_Tracker.description: Certain large threats will be displayed on your map with this item if nearby.

Mission_Prototype_Battery.flavorText: Strangely heavy for its size, the low hum it emits is slightly unnerving

Digested_Enzymes.description: Partially Digested Enzymes taken from the Stomach of Icarus Wildlife.

Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_1.description: An attachment that increases your chance of gathering Prime Meat from creatures.
Knife_Attachment_Prime_Meat_Chance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid knife at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Platinum from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Tool_Attachment_Poison.description: An attachment that has a chance to inflict Poison on hit creatures.
Tool_Attachment_Poison.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid weapon at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Legs_Arms_Attachment_Carrying_Bonus.description: An attachment that increases carrying capacity and inventory slots.
Body_Legs_Arms_Attachment_Carrying_Bonus.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest, hands or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Body_Legs_Attachment_Regen_Resistance_1.description: An attachment that improves health regeneration and physical resistance.
Body_Legs_Attachment_Regen_Resistance_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to chest or legs armor at an Alteration Bench.

Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Additional_Proj.description: An attachment that increases your chance to fire two bolts at once.
Ranged_Weapon_Attachment_Additional_Proj.flavorText: Can be attached to a valid crossbow.

Platinum_Weave.description: Platinum strands interwoven with a fiber based fabric.

Potato.description: A starchy tuber that makes up the base of many meals.
Potato.flavorText: Mash them, boil them, you can even put them in a stew.

Mission_Communication_Blueprint.description: A USB drive with the plans for an Upgraded Communication Device
Mission_Communication_Blueprint.flavorText: Once downloaded to the suit, there is no need for this item.

Platinum_Throwing_Knife.description: A precision blade, stronger than steel.
Platinum_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Platinum\'s durablity gives an incredibly accurate, lethal cutting edge.

Platinum_Throwing_Spear.description: Priceless on Earth. A projectile on Icarus.
Platinum_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: A midweight, short-shafted ahlspeiss spear that, composition aside, would not have looked out of place in 16th century Prussia.

Platinum_Crossbow.description: A crossbow that automatically reloads for rapid fire.
Platinum_Crossbow.flavorText: It\'s time for some serious damage.

ProspectorID.description: The Standard ID of a Prospector Issued by the UDA

Pickled_Tomato.description: Increases stamina, health regeneration, and shared XP.

Potato_Carrot_Fries.description: Delivers a wide range of health benefits.

Potato_Bread.description: Improves stamina and keeps you fuller for longer.

Dynamic_Mission_Beacon.description: Displays a map marker when deployed.
Dynamic_Mission_Beacon.flavorText: Lightly mapped and largely unexplored, human markers on the surface of Icarus are few and far between. The beacon offers a BYO solution.

Thumper.description: Deploy and activate to unearth mineable ore. Replenishes mineable ore in the surrounding area.
Thumper.flavorText: Sure hope this doesn\'t attract anything big...

Fish_07.description: An uncommon freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_07.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Fish_10_Var4.description: A rare freshwater fish. Can be filleted at a Fishing Bench.
Fish_10_Var4.flavorText: You caught this, with a rod or a trap. Right Click to convert this to Fish Chunks.

Poison_Sack_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted from an intact poison sac.
Poison_Sack_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Pickled_Avocado.description: Avocado that has been marinated resulting in a tangy and slightly sour flavor.
Pickled_Avocado.flavorText: A handy snack made at your Kitchen Bench.

Spawn_Blocker_T4.description: A handy item that creates a zone of protection, reducing the likelihood of creatures within its large radius. Requires electricity.
Spawn_Blocker_T4.flavorText: Note to self: Does not stop bears chasing you...

Pickled_Freshwater_Fillet.description: A tangy dish made by preserving tender fillets of freshwater fish in a flavorful mixture.
Pickled_Freshwater_Fillet.flavorText: Not for everyone, but a delicious long lasting treat for those that enjoy it.

Shield_Platinum.description: A premium-grade shield made of the finest materials, providing superior protection against the dangers of Icarus.
Shield_Platinum.flavorText: With this in hand, you\'re ready for anything.

Paints.description: Paints lovingly crafted for Portrait Painting

Platinum_Sheath.description: A small sheath of platinum which can be used in a variety of electronics and machinery.

Meta_Module_Wounds.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit with extra layers of protection against flesh wounds.
Meta_Module_Wounds.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Taming.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit with pheromones to encourage the best from your tamed creatures.
Meta_Module_Taming.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Potato_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Potato Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Platinum_Ore_Stack_100.description: As rare on Icarus as on Earth.
Platinum_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: One of the least reactive metals in the universe, platinum requires extremely high temperatures for smelting and refinement.

Icebox_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to prevent your food from spoiling on long journeys. Will run for 1 hour on a full charge. Can be recharged at a Charging Station.

Pronghorn_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Pronghorn.
Pronghorn_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Rabbit_Variant_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Pygmy Lop.
Rabbit_Variant_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Pygmy_Lopp_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Pronghorn_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Smoked_Meat_Generic.flavorText: A simple recipe for a simple snack.

Platinum_Shovel.description: Can be used to dig dirt mounds on dirt or grass, or shovel snow off your roof. Provides slight storm resistance to your crops.
Platinum_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Beacon_Tool.description: A tool to drop beacons to assist you in your exploration of Icarus.

Trail_Beacon.description: A beacon to assist you in creating a breadcrumb trail to find your way back out of uncharted territory.

Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_4.description: An audio log left behind by someone.
Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_4.flavorText: Could this hold the information you\'ve been searching for?

Pickled_Eggs.description: Boiled Eggs preseved in a pickling solution, to be consumed at a later date.

Dog_Head_B2.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_B2.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_B2.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Packed_Fuel_Brick.description: Compressed Fur mixed with Tree Sap to create a longer lasting fuel.

Dog_Head_C1.description: A preserved memory of a once loyal companion.
Dog_Head_C1.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Dog_Trophy_C1.description: A preserved memory of your Good Dog.

Lightning_Rod_Platnium.description: Channels lightning strikes safely toward the ground, saving structures from fiery destruction. Can be connected to a power network to charge batteries when struck.
Lightning_Rod_Platnium.flavorText: The effect of Minos\'s gravitational tides on the atmosphere creates extraordinarily powerful electrical storms, making these devices indispensible.

Portable_Generator.description: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
Portable_Generator.flavorText: For the prospector on the go.

Portable_Tank_Water.description: Useful for hauling water long distances. Can be connected to water networks.

Bunker_Poster.description: A collection of posters with information on Icarus.
Bunker_Poster.flavorText: Thats a lot of technical information.

Portable_Tank_Biofuel.description: Useful for hauling biofuel long distances.
Portable_Tank_Biofuel.flavorText: Carrying a large container full of explosive liquid, what could go wrong?

Drill_Arrow.description: An experimental arrow which deals extra damage against Quarrites and can mine ores.
Drill_Arrow.flavorText: A motorized drill head allows it to burrow into objects when fired.

Pavlova.description: A light, fluffy and tasty dessert.

Seed_Fertilizer.description: Stimulates the Crop to Produce Seeds over Produce.

Mission_DNA_Precipitate.description: Result of combining Ethanol with the Supernatant Solution.

Mission_Poison_Lair_Sample.description: A Sample of the Poison that was being secreted from a Garganutan Lair.

Thumper_Mini.description: A compact version of the Thumper designed to draw out creatures living underground.
Thumper_Mini.flavorText: Designed for finding underground caves, turns out it also disturbs everything living in them.

Fertility_Serum_Pig.description: Primes Male Pigs for mating. Once primed will seek out and fertilize nearby Female Pig.

Kitchen_Sink.description: Fully plumbed basin and running water, a luxury of sorts.

Piglet_Head.description: A preserved memory of a little pig.
Piglet_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Piglet_Trophy.description: The mounted remains for a creature preserved forever.
Piglet_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Pig_Head.description: A preserved memory of a snouted friend.
Pig_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Pig_Trophy.description: The mounted remains for a creature preserved forever.
Pig_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Prebuilt_Spawn_Location.description: Spawn marker for NPCs created alongside prebuilt structures
